curation_notes: Re-curation with updated hints. The patch adds RFC 952 hostname validation in the HHVM deep link handler. Only one source file was changed (pkg/nuclide-hhvm/lib/main.js). Location derived from the patch diff. Sibling files in the same directory (HhvmBuildSystem.js, HhvmDebug.js, HhvmToolbar.js, etc.) do not handle deep links or render unsanitized user input. Vulnerability class xss confirmed: CWE-79 matches the advisory description ('render HTML and other content inside of the editor's context') and the patch (adds input validation before the hostname is interpolated into UI notifications).
